description_long: This is a light turquoise bucket hat with a wide, gently sloping brim and a flat-topped, cylindrical crown. The front of the hat features bold, black stylized text reading 'YeYe' as a decorative element. The material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or polyester, giving the hat a casual and comfortable appearance. The brim is consistent in width and provides ample shade, while the crown is unadorned except for the printed text. The hat's surface has a matte finish, with no visible stitching or additional embellishments. Its overall design is simple, functional, and suitable for urban streetwear.
description: A light turquoise bucket hat with a wide, flat brim and 'YeYe' text on the front. The hat is made of soft fabric and has a casual, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'YeYe' text prominently on the crown and the full width of the brim.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible text, displaying the smooth, continuous brim and crown.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the hat, with the brim and crown uninterrupted by decoration.
description_view_3: Angled side view with a partial glimpse of the 'YeYe' text wrapping around the crown.
